05月13日.zh_des: 使用可组合的FSDP和PEFT方法微调Meta Llama3的脚本，以涵盖单节点/多节点GPU。支持摘要和问答等应用程序的默认和自定义数据集，支持多种坦率的推理解决方案，如用于本地或云部署的HF TGI、VLLM。演示应用程序以展示用于WhatsApp和Messenger的Meta Llama3。
05月13日.name: meta-llama /llama-recipes
05月13日.description: Scripts for fine-tuning Meta Llama3 with composable FSDP & PEFT methods to cover single/multi-node GPUs. Supports default & custom datasets for applications such as summarization and Q&A. Supporting a number of candid inference solutions such as HF TGI, VLLM for local or cloud deployment. Demo apps to showcase Meta Llama3 for WhatsApp & Messenger.

05月13日.zh_des: 增强的ChatGPT克隆：特性OpenAI，助手API，Azure，Groq，GPT-4 Vision，Mistral，Bing，Anthropic，OpenRouter，Vertex AI，Gemini，AI模型切换，消息搜索，langchain，Dall-E-3，ChatGPT插件，OpenAI功能，安全多用户系统，预设，完全开源的自我托管。开发中的更多功能

05月18日.name: meta-llama /llama-recipes
05月18日.description: Scripts for fine-tuning Meta Llama3 with composable FSDP & PEFT methods to cover single/multi-node GPUs. Supports default & custom datasets for applications such as summarization and Q&A. Supporting a number of candid inference solutions such as HF TGI, VLLM for local or cloud deployment. Demo apps to showcase Meta Llama3 for WhatsApp & Messenger.
